title: Glade Jar Candle, Scented Candle Infused with Essential Oils, Up to 42 Hour Burn Time, Tropical Blossoms, Pack of 6 (6 x 129g)
features: The Glade exotic tropical blossoms large candle will transport to own slice of paradise
Artfully-crafted air freshener scent with fresh and warm notes of monoi blossom, elderflower and coconut milk
Home fragrance infused with essential oils
Formulated with a specialist wax and infused with essential oils
Consistent fragrance experience from beginning to end
description: Product Description Glade Exotic Tropical Blossoms is a comforting bouquet of essential oils from the luxury exotic tropic; with notes of monoi blossom, elderflower and sweet coconut milk. Relive your favourite holidays and create your own tropical oasis in one second by pampering yourself with this relaxing, and warm scent in a Glade Candle. Simply light the wick of these scented candles to quickly fill a room with fragrance infused with essential oils. Safety Warning Always keep the wick centered and trimmed to 1/4 inch to ensure even burning and prevent smoking. Never leave a burning candle unattended. Keep candles away from flammable materials and out of reach of children and pets. Extinguish candles when they get too close to the holder or container. Do not burn a candle all the way down. For a margin of safety, discontinue burning a candle when 2 inches of wax remains in the container. Use a candle snuffer to extinguish the flame, as this helps prevent hot wax from splattering. Always place candles on a heat-resistant surface. Do not place candles in a drafty area, as this can cause the flame to flicker and the wax to burn unevenly. Store candles in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and heat sources. Manufacturer Contact Information SCJ Ltd. Camberley GU16 7AJ See more
